'''Phoebus''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near [[Elerion]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]], large deposits of fossilized amber have been found on Phoebus, containing many preserved plant- and insect specimens.<ref name="Amber">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Bioanalysis|Held in Amber}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
*{{Tales|15|Lucky Stars}} {{1stm}}
